title: eQuill Labs Curation Overrides
description: Hand-edited overrides applied by scripts/curate.ts to the GitHub snapshot. JSON cannot contain comments, so this schema file is the canonical field-level documentation.

featured.description: Repo names flagged featured: true. Order in this array is used as a sort-rank fallback when no explicit 'order' entry exists.

pinned.description: Repo names pinned to the top of listings regardless of stars or recency.

hidden.description: Repo names to exclude from the site. Supports glob patterns via '*' wildcard. Examples: 'dotfiles*' matches 'dotfiles', 'dotfiles-mac', 'dotfiles-wsl'; '*-private' matches any repo ending in '-private'. Exact string match otherwise.

hideTopics.description: Any repo tagged on GitHub with one of these topics is excluded. Tag a repo once on github.com to keep it hidden forever with no file edit.

order.description: Explicit sort-order override keyed by repo name. Lower numbers sort first. Overrides the 'featured' array index and stargazer-count fallback.
